data.body: Identity CI: 673/675/676/679/680 GREEN (V+,LLM+). 678(245e) failed on a git-store concurrency flake (invalid object / Error building trees / atomic rename failed under parallel test load — the known store-locking race class), NOT my diff: 679 which stacks ON 678 with the same 245e changes passed. Rechecked 678. Once green, close 7 tasks -> 297d -> epic -> land.
